name: Line Chart
description: Continuous data points connected by lines showing trends over time
accessibility_notes: Use distinct patterns in addition to colors. Provide data table alternative.

name: Area Chart
description: Filled line chart showing volume and trends
accessibility_notes: Use semi-transparent fills. Stacked areas can obscure data — use sparingly.

name: Bar Chart (Vertical)
description: Vertical bars comparing discrete categories
accessibility_notes: Ensure adequate spacing between bars. Use consistent bar width.

name: Bar Chart (Horizontal)
description: Horizontal bars — better for long labels
accessibility_notes: Horizontal bars are better when labels are long. Sort by value for rankings.

name: Stacked Bar Chart
description: Bars subdivided to show part-to-whole within categories
accessibility_notes: Limit to 5-6 segments. Use consistent color mapping. Provide legend.

name: Grouped Bar Chart
description: Side-by-side bars for comparing subcategories
accessibility_notes: Limit to 3-4 groups. Use consistent grouping. Label clearly.

name: Pie Chart
description: Circular chart showing proportional data
accessibility_notes: Limit to 5-6 slices. Never use 3D. Include percentage labels.

name: Donut Chart
description: Pie chart with center cutout for key metric display
best_for: KPI with breakdown;Progress with detail;Summary metric
accessibility_notes: Center metric provides context. Same slice limit as pie chart.

name: Scatter Plot
description: Data points plotted by two variables showing correlation
accessibility_notes: Use distinct shapes for categories. Ensure adequate point size for clickability.

name: Bubble Chart
description: Scatter plot with size as third variable
accessibility_notes: Size differences must be perceptible. Label key bubbles directly.

name: Heatmap
description: Color-coded matrix showing intensity across two dimensions
accessibility_notes: Use sequential color scale. Provide numeric values on hover.

name: Treemap
description: Nested rectangles showing hierarchical proportional data
accessibility_notes: Labels must be readable. Limit depth to 2-3 levels.

name: Radar/Spider Chart
description: Multi-axis chart comparing multiple variables
accessibility_notes: Limit to 5-8 axes. Normalize scales. Difficult for colorblind users.

name: Funnel Chart
description: Progressively narrowing stages showing conversion
accessibility_notes: Label each stage with count and percentage. Use consistent color coding.

name: Gauge/Meter
description: Semi-circular or circular meter showing single KPI against target
accessibility_notes: Include numeric value. Color-code zones (red/yellow/green).

name: Sparkline
description: Tiny inline chart showing trends without axes
best_for: Compact trend display;Table cell trends;Inline metrics
accessibility_notes: No interactivity needed. Include start/end values for context.

name: Waterfall Chart
description: Bars showing incremental positive/negative changes
accessibility_notes: Color-code positive and negative. Show running total.

name: Sankey Diagram
description: Flow diagram showing quantity transfers between stages
accessibility_notes: Maintain consistent flow direction. Label all nodes and significant flows.

name: Candlestick Chart
description: OHLC chart showing open/high/low/close financial data
accessibility_notes: Use standard green/red convention. Include volume bar below.

name: Timeline
description: Horizontal timeline showing events chronologically
accessibility_notes: Ensure adequate spacing. Group dense periods. Use clear date labels.

name: KPI Card
description: Single large metric with comparison and trend indicator
accessibility_notes: Large readable number. Include comparison period. Color-code trend direction.

name: Progress Ring
description: Circular progress indicator with percentage
accessibility_notes: Include percentage label. Use brand color for fill.

name: Small Multiples
description: Repeated small charts with same scale for comparison
best_for: Comparing many categories;Regional comparison;Time period comparison
accessibility_notes: Maintain identical scales. Label each clearly. Limit to 12 charts.

name: Box Plot
description: Statistical chart showing median quartiles and outliers
accessibility_notes: Label median and quartile values. Explain to non-statistical audiences.

name: Histogram
description: Bars showing frequency distribution of continuous data
accessibility_notes: Choose appropriate bin width. Label axes clearly. Show count or percentage.
